proposal_summary: Compound Growth Program (AlphaGrowth) proposes to add tETH as collateral into the cWETHv3 market on the Ethereum network, alongside upgrading Comet to a new version.

disclosed_entities.name: cWETHv3
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Add tETH as collateral into cWETHv3 on Mainnet

disclosed_entities.name: Comet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: deploys and upgrades Comet to a new version

claimed_actions.raw_action: Add tETH asset as collateral with corresponding configurations.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Risk parameters are set based on recommendations from Gauntlet and tETH becomes an accepted collateral.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The first action adds tETH asset as collateral with corresponding configurations.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Deploy and upgrade Comet to a new version.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Upgrades the Compound III Comet implementation to a new version.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The second action deploys and upgrades Comet to a new version.

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves adding a new collateral asset with configured risk parameters and an implementation upgrade of Comet.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The first action adds tETH asset as collateral... The second action deploys and upgrades Comet to a new version.

limitations: No smart contract addresses are provided in the proposal text.
Specific parameter values for the configurations (e.g., LTV, supply caps) are not disclosed in the text.
